nameMeanings.name: Boyd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the island of Bute in the Firth of Clyde, from Bòid (genitive case of Bòd, the Gaelic name of the island of Bute) or Bòideach, denoting a person from Bute. Alternatively, the name may denote descendants of a Gilla filius Boed, who appears in reference to Glasgow Cathedral in the early 12th century, perhaps from the Gaelic personal name Boite, of uncertain origin.
Scottish and Irish: from the Gaelic epithet buidhe ‘yellow(-haired)’. Compare Bowie .
Manx: from Mac Gille Buidhe ‘son of the yellow-haired lad’ (compare 2 above).

variants.name: Bowie
meanings: Scottish: from Gaelic buidhe ‘yellow’, i.e. ‘yellow-haired’, pronounced as two syllables. The equivalent term in Ireland is buí, often Anglicized as boy. The surname may also be a shortened form of Gilboy .
Irish: Anglicized form of Ó Buadhaigh (see Bogue ).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Boyd was born about 1323, in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Robert Boyd V 1st Lord of Kilmarnock, was 39 and his mother, Catherine Fleming, was 33. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Margaret Douglas. He died in October 1367, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Boyd est né environ 1323, à Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Robert Boyd V 1st Lord of Kilmarnock, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Catherine Fleming, avait 33 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Margaret Douglas. Il est décédé en octobre 1367, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Boyd um 1323 in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Boyd V 1st Lord of Kilmarnock 39 und seine Mutter Catherine Fleming 33. ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Boyd(이)가 대략 1323년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬마노c크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Boyd V 1st Lord of Kilmarnock(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Fleming(은)는 33세였다. 그는 Margaret Douglas(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1367년 10월 45세의 나이로 사망했다.
